subcodes.title: Letter to Jinab-i-Dhabih Dhakiru'llah
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He before Whom bow down in adoration all who dwell in the heavens and on the earth and whatsoever lieth between them. Say: All are submissive unto Him. And praise be unto God, before Whom prostrate themselves whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is on earth and whatsoever lieth between them! Say: All are prostrate before Him. God beareth witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الاعظم الاعظم. سبحان الذی یسجد له من فی السموات و من فی الارض و ما بینهما قل کل له قانتون و الحمد لله الذی یسجد له من فی السموات و الارض و ما بینهما قل کل له ساجدون شهد الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will
